Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO SOCIAL SERVICES

Title: Relates to eligibility for the temporary assistance to needy families block grant program, safety net assistance and medical assistance for certain noncitizens
Summary: Relates to eligibility for the temporary assistance to needy families block grant program, safety net assistance and medical assistance for certain noncitizens.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the social services law, in relation to eligibility for the temporary assistance to needy families block grant program, safety net assistance and medical assistance for certain noncitizens
